PI 28
Feature Catalog  ·  Roadmap Initiative Group
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction
Netcompany
2,200 Total Hours
7 Epics
5 Initiatives
35 Features
GRC Requester
PI 28

Strategic Rationale Why It Matters
01
Eliminate Technical Debt
Restructures the revenue-management-be-custom service to a clean hexagonal architecture — improving separation of concerns, testability, and long-term maintainability across all delivery teams.
02
Platform Currency & Security
Delivers critical runtime upgrades to Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai — keeping the platform performant, secure, and aligned with modern enterprise standards ahead of upcoming project deliveries.
03
Safe Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool — enabling teams to safely package, version, and migrate configurations across dev, staging, and production without manual risk or environment drift.
Business Value & Market Relevance
Business Value
  • Enables long-term platform health — reducing the cost of change and onboarding for all delivery teams
  • Critical runtime upgrades reduce security exposure ahead of upcoming Greek project go-live
  • Config Items Management eliminates high-risk manual configuration steps across all environments
  • Hexagonal refactor directly improves testability — reducing regression risk and release cycle time
Market & Strategic Relevance
  • Platform currency (Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, Oracle 26ai) is a prerequisite for future project bids
  • Strengthens Netcompany's position as a maintainable, enterprise-grade tax platform
  • Directly supports pipeline projects contingent on platform stability and compliance posture
  • Reduces total cost of ownership — a key differentiator in competitive procurement processes
Key Epics & Features 6 Epics across 5 teams
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
IRM-40177
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture — decoupling domain logic from infrastructure, improving testability and reducing coupling across domain boundaries.
Architecture ATH · EOS
Java 25 Upgrade
IRM-38242
Migrate the full codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
Infrastructure All Teams
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
IRM-37610
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
Infrastructure SPA · HEL
Oracle 26ai Database
IRM-33555
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimization, advanced analytics, and improved throughput for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Data DAID
Tech Debt Across Teams
IRM-33531 · IRM-30464
Systematic UI improvements and code quality initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams — reducing accumulated debt for long-term platform sustainability.
Quality ATH · EOS · SPA · HEL · DAID
Config Items Management
IRM-29268
Build a dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across environments — eliminating manual intervention and environment-specific drift.
DevX All Environments
